armdef's 23 chapter III character templates convert as `TEMPLATE`s (done 2026-07-14,
**Composition, editions & precedence — RESOLVED (D8; recorded in spec DECISION-4 + §5/§13/§19).**
**Validator: scope the duplicate-anchor check.** Today `ttrpg_validator.py` errors on *any*
**Converters emit/retain an edition diff** (what changed E1→E2) so the future forward-port
**Forward-port tool (future, out of scope now).** Generate a newer-edition `.ttrpg` of a

**armdef Shape & Material table — RESOLVED 2026-07-14.** The 2-column page layout scrambled
**`.ttrpg → .json` transform + machine (JSON) contract.** Per-system output schemas and the
**Downstream "sophisticated rules validation"** (chargen legality, rules consistency) — built

tasks.text: Define the TASKS.md convention and dogfood it here
Parse TASKS.md + derive standards-debt tasks in gen.mjs
Roll out TASKS.md to the active repos so the queue reflects real work
Document the convention in the repo README
Add a LICENSE across the public repos
Optional later: structural-validation CI for DSL corpora (validator over `.ttrpg` only — honest and source-free; NOT coverage)

Human validation program: check each corpus **sentence-by-sentence against its source PDF** — every statblock, spell, table, etc. Build alignment + resumable-ledger tooling WHEN this starts (per-corpus, beginning with the most-used corpus); the judgment stays human, no automated pass may mark it green. Not started.
Consider a "stale backlog" signal when TASKS.md itself goes untouched
Let the Tasks tab deep-link via URL hash (e.g. ?repo=caul)
